entries.name: Headhunter
entries.flavour:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
entries.stat_bounds:
Community / poe2db style — possible rolls for this base unique, not a snapshot of this one item.

Has (1—3) Charm Slot
(20—30)% increased Stun Threshold
+(40—60) to maximum Life
+(20—40) to Strength
+(20—40) to Dexterity
